metadata.name: slash-topic-query
metadata.description: Protocol definition for the slash-topic-query adapter in Lattice FederatedQueryPlane. Maps Lattice governed query routing to Slash Topics topic packs, policy membranes, deterministic receipts, and scoped search.

dryRun.description: Validates route and policy without reading topic packs or executing search.

steps.description: Resolve latticeBackend.routeRef against the Lattice route registry. Reject if the route is unknown, expired, or unauthorised.

Verify that every slug in topicScope.topicSlugs has a valid slash-topic path prefix (starts with '/'). If topicPackRef is present, verify the reference is syntactically valid without fetching pack bytes.
Resolve policyMembrane.membraneRef against the policy registry and confirm that requiredDecision is a reachable outcome for the given topic scope and policy tags.
Emit a dry-run receipt with validation outcome, route status, and membrane resolution status. The receipt MUST indicate dryRun: true and MUST NOT include a resultSetRef.

invariants: No topic pack bytes are read at any step.
No search query is issued at any step.
The dry-run receipt does not include search result data.

live.description: Full governed execution: membrane check, topic pack read, scoped search, and deterministic receipt.

steps.description: Evaluate the policy membrane against topic scope and policy tags. If the decision is DENY or QUARANTINE, halt immediately and emit a denial receipt.
Fetch topic pack bytes identified by topicScope.topicPackRef (if provided). Verify pack digest against topicPackDigest. Emit context.pack.selected and context.pack.fetched provenance events.
Issue the search query scoped to the resolved topic slugs. Enforce maxHits and constraints from scopedSearch.
Emit a deterministic receipt containing all required fields from deterministicReceipt.requiredFields. Hash and optionally sign per canonicalization rules.
